ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.G.Docs: The IP address assigned to the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.N.Docs: The group members' network interface IDs to register with the transit gateway multicast group.

ec2.transitgatewaymulticastgroupmember.T.Docs: The ID of the transit gateway multicast domain.
